purpose: Regression contract for preserving YonerAI Status UI/UX while feed/runtime internals change.

tooltip_singleton.rule: There must be exactly one #barTooltip node.
tooltip_singleton.why: Duplicate tooltip nodes caused flicker and wrong positioning.

tooltip_not_pointer_target.rule: The tooltip must not steal pointer events from bars.
tooltip_not_pointer_target.why: Pointer capture by tooltip can create hover flicker.

selected_bar_singleton.rule: At most one .bar.is-selected may exist after route sync.
selected_bar_singleton.why: Stale selected highlights broke bar cascade and made reopened panels feel corrupted.

selected_bar_route_match.rule: If a selected bar exists, its dataset.route must match the parsed current hash route.
selected_bar_route_match.why: Highlight must represent the current detail route only.

detail_panel_singleton.rule: At most one #barDetailPanel and at most one #incidentDetailPanel may exist.
detail_panel_singleton.why: Double panels caused layout jumps and confusing hover/click behavior.

panel_mode_exclusive.rule: A bar detail panel and incident detail panel must not both be visible for a single route unless explicitly supported.
panel_mode_exclusive.why: Mixed panels caused status detail pages to collapse into incorrect content.

feed_update_clears_invalid_selection.rule: After trySetFeed with a feed that does not contain the selected route, selectedCount must become 0 and the route must be safe.
feed_update_clears_invalid_selection.why: Feed-driven runtime must not keep highlights for deleted data.

bar_count_matches_feed.rule: Rendered bar count must equal sum(categories.children.days.length) plus category overview bars when category bars are rendered.
bar_count_matches_feed.why: Missing bars means feed is not represented faithfully.

category_overview_derived_from_children.rule: Category overview status bars must be derived from child component day states and severity, not hand-written category day data.
category_overview_derived_from_children.why: Overview must behave like real status systems and represent component aggregation.

hover_does_not_select.rule: Pointer hover may set hover state and tooltip, but must not create .is-selected.
hover_does_not_select.why: Hover and selected detail state must remain separate.

touch_pin_persists_until_outside_or_scro.rule: On touch devices, a tapped/navigated bar tooltip may remain pinned until outside pointerdown or scroll.
touch_pin_persists_until_outside_or_scro.why: Mobile users cannot hover, so touch tooltip persistence is required.

mobile_tooltip_above_finger.rule: On coarse pointers, tooltip should prefer placement above the touch point and stay inside the viewport.
mobile_tooltip_above_finger.why: Tooltip below the finger is hidden by the user's finger.

tooltip_viewport_clamped.rule: Tooltip left/top must be clamped inside the viewport.
tooltip_viewport_clamped.why: Overflowing tooltip caused unreadable mobile and desktop edge cases.

bar_cursor_stable.rule: Pointer movement across bars must not switch cursor shape unexpectedly.
bar_cursor_stable.why: Cursor flicker made the bar strip feel broken.

bar_cascade_single_pass.rule: Bar cascade animation must play once per render/open cycle, not double-fire fallback and primary animation together.
bar_cascade_single_pass.why: Double cascade was visible as two waves.

bar_cascade_left_to_right.rule: Bar cascade must visually originate from the left edge in document order, not from center transform origin.
bar_cascade_left_to_right.why: Center-origin bars made the animation feel wrong.

disclosure_layout_animates_open_and_clos.rule: Opening and closing category/child disclosures must animate layout height without a final snap.
disclosure_layout_animates_open_and_clos.why: The page previously jumped at the end of close animation.

reduced_motion_supported.rule: prefers-reduced-motion must disable or shorten non-essential animation without hiding content.
reduced_motion_supported.why: Accessibility must not break status visibility.

dark_mode_surface_coverage.rule: Detail cards, incident panels, update timeline, affected rows, and tooltip must all use theme variables.
dark_mode_surface_coverage.why: Mixed dark/light surfaces produced unreadable black text and white seams.

mobile_range_header_no_wrap_glitch.rule: The date range and arrow controls must not split into vertical text at common mobile and scaled desktop widths.
mobile_range_header_no_wrap_glitch.why: Range label wrapping broke the status overview header.

manual_viewports.name: 4k-200-percent-effective
checks: status scale line length remains stable
